ast.name: error
ast.target: anchorNode 和/或 focusNode 为 null

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is made possible by our own product, Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: log
ast.target: 添加 CMAP 格式 12（必需！）

ast.name: log
ast.source: Note: further hinting errors are silenced
ast.target: 注意：后续的提示错误已被静默处理

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 不带 'await' 使用 addListener() 已弃用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Deprecated: Expected third argument to be a object
ast.target: 已弃用：期望第三个参数为对象

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Font.toBuffer is deprecated. Use Font.toArrayBuffer instead.
ast.target: Font.toBuffer 已弃用。请改用 Font.toArrayBuffer。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Only the first kern subtable is supported.
ast.target: 仅支持第一个 kern 子表。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Opening link blocked as opener could not be cleared
ast.target: 由于无法清除 opener，打开链接被阻止

ast.name: warn
ast.source: webgl context not restored; firing onContextLoss
ast.target: webgl 上下文未恢复；触发 onContextLoss

ast.name: warn
ast.source: async parser handler taking longer than 5000 ms
ast.target: 异步解析器处理程序耗时超过 5000 毫秒

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的配置有问题。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前就访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: 初始化：未使用语言检测器且未定义 lng。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: 初始化：i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用一次 init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致过时的值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是一个组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Since Acorn 8.0.0, options.ecmaVersion is required.
Defaulting to 2020, but this will stop working in the future.
ast.target: 自 Acorn 8.0.0 起，options.ecmaVersion 是必需的。\n默认为 2020，但这在未来将停止工作。
